sourceIntake.sourceSummary: Sample controlled Family B/C brief: a source chart shows revenue expanding while market price compresses.

approvedClaims.claim: Revenue increased while price declined over the same source period.
approvedClaims.visualAttachment: The claim attaches to the chart line and gap bracket after the marker event.

whatMustNotBeClaimed: Do not invent dates or values not present in the source chart.

evidenceAudit.sourceBoundary: Only the approved manager chart fixture may supply claims and values.

claims.claim: Revenue increased while price declined over the same source period.
claims.visualAttachment: The proof is born from a bracket pulled directly from the chart.

numbers: Use exact chart labels from the approved fixture only.
caveats: Sample fixture for Phase 1 validation, not a production claim.
evidenceAudit.headlineProof: Divergence between the source chart line and price line.
supportingProof: Direct labels stay attached to chart points.
visualProof: Gap bracket appears only after the chart marker lands.
offscreenProof: Source note remains in the lower safe zone.

mechanismDiagnosis.stateChange: The gap widens into an investable proof object.
mechanismDiagnosis.proofConsequence: The viewer sees the spread before reading the number.

benchmarkDeconstruction.referenceSummary: Light chart-native reels with direct labels, clean source proof, simple logo/icon support, and CTA residue.
benchmarkDeconstruction.hookBehavior: Large mobile-readable headline enters before the chart becomes the stage.
benchmarkDeconstruction.chartRole: The chart is the terrain and proof object, not wallpaper.
benchmarkDeconstruction.assetBehavior: One restrained logo/icon marker behaves as an actor on the chart.
benchmarkDeconstruction.CTAStyle: CTA inherits the final underline/bracket residue.
whatToAdapt: Direct labels attached to source geometry
whatNotToCopy: Do not copy the creator's exact layout.
Do not paste proof as a detached card.

routeOptions.summary: A caliper measures the distance opened by the chart divergence.
The rising source line presses against a flat valuation line.

chartProof.proofMoment: The bracket expands from the exact chart points after the marker lands.
chartProof.adaptationRationale: Faithful SVG recreation keeps the chart legible at 1080x1920.
fidelityRisks: Wrong point alignment would detach proof from source geometry.

assetBoard.proofObjectTarget: Bracket born from source chart coordinates
assetBoard.residueObjectTarget: CTA underline inherited from the gap bracket

logoIconAssets.label: Invesense watermark
logoIconAssets.licenseNote: Owned brand asset placeholder for Phase 1 fixture.
logoIconAssets.behavior: Stays quiet in the safe zone; does not become the proof.

logoIconAssets.label: Chart marker dot
logoIconAssets.behavior: Travels along the chart path and triggers the proof bracket.

assetBoard.labelSurfaceTarget: Direct chart labels attached to lines and bracket endpoints.
assetBoard.materialTarget: Warm white paper, navy ink, Invesense green accent, restrained red contrast.
assetBoard.layoutTarget: Family B/C light editorial vertical reel with large safe-zone typography.
assetBoard.CodexRecreationNotes: Codex must recreate the approved styleframes and source geometry only after human approval.

lottieSearch.motionNeed: Subtle route pulse that emphasizes the chart marker without becoming the hero metaphor.
licenseNotes: Confirm per-asset LottieFiles license before download and production use.
lottieSearch.previewBehavior: Small pulse, one-shot, transparent background, recolorable if possible.
whatNotToCopy: Do not let Lottie replace the chart proof.
lottieSearch.fallbackNativeRemotionOption: Animate a native SVG pulse ring using spring timing.

lottieCandidates.licenseNote: Candidate only; license must be confirmed before production.

styleframes.framePurpose: Set the claim and reveal the chart as the stage.
styleframes.layoutProportions: Top 25 percent headline, middle 55 percent chart, bottom 20 percent source and watermark.
styleframes.objectGeometry: Two line paths and one marker dot.
styleframes.chartTarget: Faithful chart geometry with mobile-readable direct labels.
styleframes.proofAttachmentRules: Labels attach to chart endpoints and never float as generic cards.

codexHandoff.humanRouteSelectionRecord: Phase 1 sample route approved for schema validation only.
codexHandoff.humanConceptApprovalRecord: Phase 1 sample concept approved for knowledge-layer smoke testing only.

selectedRoute.simplePhysicalSentence: A chart gap opens and the caliper turns it into proof.
selectedRoute.physicalEvent: Marker lands, bracket expands, proof label locks to the bracket.
selectedRoute.proofBirth: Proof label appears only after the bracket expands from source points.
selectedRoute.residue: The bracket straightens into the CTA underline.
selectedRoute.noLabelTest: The widening distance between lines should be readable before labels.
risks: Detached label would weaken proof birth.
Overdecorated Lottie would make it feel templated.

chartSpecs.proofMoment: The bracket expands from the exact chart points after the marker lands.
chartSpecs.adaptationRationale: Faithful SVG recreation keeps the chart legible at 1080x1920.
fidelityRisks: Wrong point alignment would detach proof from source geometry.

lottieSpecs.licenseNote: Candidate only; license must be confirmed before production.

styleframeTargets.framePurpose: Set the claim and reveal the chart as the stage.
styleframeTargets.layoutProportions: Top 25 percent headline, middle 55 percent chart, bottom 20 percent source and watermark.
styleframeTargets.objectGeometry: Two line paths and one marker dot.
styleframeTargets.chartTarget: Faithful chart geometry with mobile-readable direct labels.
styleframeTargets.proofAttachmentRules: Labels attach to chart endpoints and never float as generic cards.

benchmarkLinks.reason: Chart proof and light editorial pacing are primary.
Logo/icon actor supports the chart without replacing it.
